title: New Shield Variants
description: This mod adds new variants to shields, created from a wide range of materials! Obviously, they get stronger the more expensive the shield is.
body:
![NEW SHIELD VARIANTS BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w5Fni7I5/images/10910d5f5ec66ae1ffd488a9bd03fb26fc29d543.webp) This mod adds new variants to shields, created from a wide range of materials! Obviously, they get stronger the more expensive the shield is. Our goal is to add new shields with effects in future updates. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![NEW SHIELD VARIANTS SUMMARY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w5Fni7I5/images/0eff2b2cb84c551c7285c58894508d211dc5db17.webp) Initially, this mod was designed to add shields made of different materials, and of course, with different hardnesses, such as minerals. But when developing it, we realized the full potential of the mod, and therefore, we have added some shields with effects. Shields with added effects: - Ender Shield: a powerful shield which teleports your enemies away from you. - Blaze Shield: ignite your attackers without fighting back. - Fire Charge Shield: which sends a projectile at your enemies every time you block. - TNT Shield: Throw a dynamite every time the shield is used - Dragon Shield: Slows down enemies temporarily with slow effects. - Shulker Shield: every time the shield is used, the player will levitate. ![NEW SHIELD VARIANTS F.A.Q](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w5Fni7I5/images/c6116410c0884bb0daec61a188144427949c73fa.webp) ### Is the hardness of the shields different? Each shield has a durability according to the manufacturing material, being, for example, the diamond one much better than the stone one. In any case, we plan to make big changes in future updates. ### The shields give new effects, or are they just those from Minecraft? Some shields, such as Shulker's, give a levitation effect, but there are many others according to their manufacturing material that are not effects as such. For example, the TNT launcher. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![NEW SHIELD VARIANTS SCREENSHOT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w5Fni7I5/images/632b4cc4fafeb495fc4c6b6c70e96df7180cfa5e.webp) ![NEW SHIELD VARIANTS SCREENSHOT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/w5Fni7I5/images/3ef85252017f91085ffe66c205a8b56b177ebeeb.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
